productDisplayName: Free Authority Men Stripes Purple Sweatshirts
description: Composition Aubergine and black striped sweatshirt made of 48% cotton and 52% polyester, has a round neck, long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, a flat knit hem and brand logo embroidered on the left chest Fitting Comfort Wash care Machine wash in warm water with similar colours Do not dry clean Use a non-chlorine bleach if needed Do not iron on print This bioworld jersey is precision-tailored to smartly create your everyday wear and make it a fashion must-have. The winter's texture trend this year has reached a new high with this cozy yet stylish piece. Pair it with corduroys or jeans.
